name: Chicken Piccata Karen Parr (Svmf28b)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the egg with 1 tablespoon of lemon juice.
2. Combine flour, garlic powder, and paprika in a separate bowl.
3. Dip chicken pieces in the egg mixture, then in the flour mixture.
4. Brown in butter in a skillet.
5. Dissolve granules in boiling water and add with remaining lemon juice to skillet.
6. Cover and simmer for 20 minutes.
7. Serves 4.
